mapper.sql: id, pdf_id, user_id, page_num, scroll_top, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdf_progress (pdf_id, user_id, page_num, scroll_top, updated_at) VALUES (#{pdfId}, #{userId}, #{pageNum}, #{scrollTop}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE page_num = VALUES(page_num), scroll_top = VALUES(scroll_top), updated_at = NOW()
